content.en:
The challenge begins!

The Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor immediately cast a top-notch immeasurable supernatural technique—the Falling Star Technique!

After casting the Falling Star, the speed of the Lone Star Celestial Ancestor reached a terrifying level.

"Star Technique!"

In the void, starlight pierced through the holes, and the power of each starlight reached an extremely powerful level.

However.

Ye Tian unleashed his ten-armed golden body, ignoring this star technique, and immediately blasted over with a punch, bursting out with the power of the extreme technique.

Bang!!!!

The Void Bursts.

Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor was attacked by the aftermath, and he seemed to be a little unbearable, and quickly retreated.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian regarded himself as a pole, and when he used the pole technique, he shuttled in instantly, which was faster than that of the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor.

"Not good!"

Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor's face changed, and he tried to resist, but it was too late.

Bang!

A punch down.

The body of the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor was directly pierced.

The next moment.

The body of the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor turned into countless starlight and spread out, converging in another place.

This is another immeasurable supernatural technique—the art of turning stars!

The Technique of Falling Stars, the Technique of Spotting Stars, and the Technique of Turning Stars are the techniques of the Lone Star Celestial Ancestor's fame-known immeasurable powers.

But at this moment, in front of Ye Tian, these three immeasurable gods are not very useful.

"The speed of this Endless Heavenly Ancestor is too fast, even faster than the speed of the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Moreover, the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor can't withstand the attack of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor at all, and the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is probably at the top among the boundary-breaking geniuses!"

"Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor can't hold on to a few moves, his immeasurable magic technique is useless at all!"

"The strength of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is too strong, which force is the Heavenly Ancestor of which force is he?"

"Who knows which territorial sea he is, maybe he is a local cultivator of the territorial sea boundary seam, the strength of the territorial sea boundary seam is complicated, and it is difficult to investigate. "

While these Heavenly Ancestors were discussing, Ye Tian launched another attack on the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor.

Bang bang bang!!!

Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor was blown up by Ye Tian again and again, and finally couldn't bear it and was completely killed.

100 consecutive wins achieved!

......

The primeval divine realm, personal space.

After Ye Tian came back, he clicked on it and looked at his balance.

"Sixty million points!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

According to the exchange comparison, this is equivalent to 60,000 Taikoo gold!

Maybe for a seven-time Blood Transformation Realm cultivator, 60,000 Taigu Gold is not much, but it is terrifying to be able to obtain 60,000 Taigu Gold in just one game!

Moreover, this is only a 100-game winning streak, if he plays a 1000-game winning streak and 10,000-winning streak challenge, the number of onlookers will be more, and the income he will get from Taikoo Gold will be more.

It's a lot more comfortable than collecting resources on your own!

"Continue to apply for the challenge!"

Ye Tian applied for his one hundred and first game.

However, in the later challenge matches, the number of onlookers decreased dramatically, but each time they could get a few hundred pieces of Ancient Gold.

Later, the number of onlookers was even smaller, and even the income was only a few dozen pieces of Taikoo Gold each time.

There is no way, his strength is too strong, every time he kills the opponent with one punch, it would be good to have Tianzu to see it.

"I knew that every time I pretended to be evenly matched, maybe I watched more Heavenly Ancestors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But for the sake of Taikoo Jin, this is not his original character.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian kept his winning streak and became more and more famous.

Two hundred wins in a row!

300 wins in a row!

500 wins in a row!

Eight hundred wins in a row!

After a long time, Ye Tian finally applied for the thousandth game.

It will also be his 1,000-game winning streak challenge.

The Ancient God Realm sent a message to every Heavenly Ancestor who paid attention to Ye Tian, coupled with the Heavenly Ancestor publicity, so countless Heavenly Ancestors knew about Ye Tian's Thousand Consecutive Wins Challenge!

Moreover, the 1,000-game winning streak challenge is almost always a matchup of boundary-breaking geniuses, and there have never been exceptions.

......

Ancient territorial waters.

Hanging Mountain.

As a boundary-breaking genius of the Hanging Mountain, there is no Heavenly Ancestor, and he was invited by the Ancient God Realm to participate in the challenge.

Of course, he can choose to refuse.

In this way, the Ancient God Realm would invite other Heavenly Ancestors.

"I'm a boundary-breaking genius, the Ancient God Realm invited me, there is only one possibility, and that is that the opponent is not ordinary!"

He directly agreed.

Immediately, waiting for the notice of the Ancient God Realm, he directly entered the Ancient God Realm challenge space.

It didn't take long for the announcement of the primeval god realm to come.

Swish!

The Absolute Heavenly Ancestor entered the Ancient God Realm and came to the challenge space.

And Ye Tian also came in!

At the same time, countless Heavenly Ancestors poured into this challenge space to watch this game.

"Hey, the target of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor's challenge turned out to be the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Absolute Heavenly Ancestor is also a very, very powerful boundary-breaking genius, and his cultivation has reached six Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and the battle is equivalent to seven Blood Transformation Realm Invincible!"

"Two boundary-breaking geniuses are fighting, I don't know who can win!"

"Not to mention the true cultivation of the outside world, just referring to the challenge competition within the primeval god realm, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has a greater chance of winning. Because I often watch the Endless Heavenly Ancestor's games, I can see from its strength that it is more powerful than the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor. "

"I think no Heavenly Ancestor is more powerful!"

......

"There are so many Heavenly Ancestors watching the battle, and it has broken one million so quickly!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, there were many Heavenly Ancestors who came in one after another to watch the battle.

It took a while for the challenge to officially begin.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian and the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor collided together in an instant.

"Void God Demon Fist!"

This is also an incomparably top-notch immeasurable magic technique, if it is placed in the territorial waters of Wanlong, it can definitely be ranked in the top three, second only to Ye Tian's extreme technique.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian's Extreme Technique and the opponent's Void God and Demon Fist continued to collide, and the battle instantly entered a white-hot heat.

However, Ye Tian's pole technique was more powerful, so he quickly gained a little advantage.

For a Heavenly Ancestor like him, as long as he has a little advantage, he can seize the opportunity and continue to amplify the advantage.

As time passed, the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor began to get hurt.

"Ten Arms Golden Body!"

The ten arms used the Extreme Technique one after another, bombarding the body of the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor again and again, and the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor continued to shatter his body.

Absolute Heavenly Ancestor is also very calm, showing all his methods, without any mistakes at all.

It's a pity that his strength is still a little worse.

In the end, the Absolute Heavenly Ancestor was defeated!

"This Peerless Heavenly Ancestor is really powerful, if you don't rely on the Ancient God and Demon Fist and just rely on the Infinite Divine Powers, it will be really difficult to defeat him!" Ye Tian said darkly.
